name: register
description: Register for a Nex API key.

name: query_context
description: Query the Nex context graph with a natural language question.

name: add_context
description: Ingest unstructured text into the Nex context graph.

name: get_artifact_status
description: Check processing status of a submitted text artifact.

name: create_list_job
description: Create an AI-powered list generation job.

name: get_list_job_status
description: Check status of an AI list generation job.

name: search_records
description: Search records by name across all object types.

name: search_entities
description: Search entities across the knowledge graph.

name: create_object
description: Create a new custom object type definition.

name: get_object
description: Get a single object type definition with its attributes.

name: list_objects
description: List all object type definitions in the workspace.

name: update_object
description: Update an existing object type definition.

name: delete_object
description: Delete an object type definition and ALL its records.

name: create_attribute
description: Add a new attribute (field) to an object type.

name: update_attribute
description: Update an existing attribute definition.

name: delete_attribute
description: Delete an attribute from an object type.

name: create_record
description: Create a new record for an object type.

name: upsert_record
description: Create or update a record by matching criteria.

name: get_record
description: Retrieve a specific record by its ID.

name: update_record
description: Update specific attributes on an existing record.

name: delete_record
description: Permanently delete a record.

name: list_records
description: List records for an object type with filtering and pagination.

name: get_record_timeline
description: Get paginated timeline events for a record.

name: create_relationship_definition
description: Define a new relationship type between two object types.

name: list_relationship_definitions
description: List all relationship type definitions.

name: delete_relationship_definition
description: Delete a relationship type definition.

name: create_relationship
description: Link two records using a relationship definition.

name: delete_relationship
description: Remove a relationship between two records.

name: list_object_lists
description: Get all lists for an object type.

name: create_list
description: Create a new list under an object type.

name: get_list
description: Get a list definition by ID.

name: delete_list
description: Delete a list definition.

name: add_list_member
description: Add an existing record to a list.

name: upsert_list_member
description: Add or update a record in a list.

name: list_list_records
description: Get paginated records from a list.

name: update_list_record
description: Update list-specific attributes for a record.

name: delete_list_record
description: Remove a record from a list.

name: create_task
description: Create a new task, optionally linked to records.

name: list_tasks
description: List tasks with optional filtering.

name: get_task
description: Get a single task by ID.

name: update_task
description: Update a task.

name: delete_task
description: Archive a task.

name: create_note
description: Create a new note, optionally linked to a record.

name: list_notes
description: List notes, optionally filtered by record.

name: get_note
description: Get a single note by ID.

name: update_note
description: Update a note.

name: delete_note
description: Archive a note.

name: get_insights
description: Query insights by time window. Returns opportunities, risks, and milestones.

name: scan_files
description: Scan a directory and ingest changed files into Nex.

name: ingest_context_files
description: Ingest CLAUDE.md and memory files into Nex.

name: list_integrations
description: List all third-party integrations and their status.

name: connect_integration
description: Start connecting a third-party integration via OAuth.

name: get_connect_status
description: Check OAuth connection status.

name: disconnect_integration
description: Disconnect a third-party integration.

name: get_notifications
description: List recent or pending notifications.

name: get_notification_preferences
description: Get current notification preferences.

name: set_notification_preferences
description: Update notification preferences.

name: create_notification_rule
description: Create a custom AI notification rule in natural language.

name: list_notification_rules
description: List all custom notification rules.

name: delete_notification_rule
description: Delete a custom notification rule.
